# Test chat-list command validation
# The chat-list command lists all saved chat sessions
# Requires: no arguments (it lists local sessions)
# Note: This command does NOT require authentication (it only reads local files)

# === CHAT-LIST COMMAND ===
# Test chat-list with no arguments (should succeed without auth)
exec ./nlm_test chat-list
! stderr 'panic'
! stderr 'Authentication required'

# In non-TTY mode (txtar's exec pipe) the decorative dashed separator row
# must not appear on stdout. It would break `chat-list | cut -f1` piping.
! stdout '^------'
! stdout '^===='

# Test chat-list with too many arguments (should fail with usage)
! exec ./nlm_test chat-list notebook123 extra
stderr 'usage: nlm chat-list \[notebook-id\]'
! stderr 'panic'
